description: This pipeline reads in a folder with files and proceeds to filter each of the files. The main steps include reading in the folder, filtering the images, and preparing them for further analysis.

75f1c151-0a06-44f4-bc71-c170f653754b.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
75f1c151-0a06-44f4-bc71-c170f653754b.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.

ba08b9f2-319e-4e44-b66e-dd3c534415d2.name: annotate-filter-by-annotation
ba08b9f2-319e-4e44-b66e-dd3c534415d2.description: Filters data based on the annotation value.
